page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating with 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a compute-optimized allocation of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear division between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core metrics falling into the bottom 25 percent, and single-threaded gzip compression scoring in the bottom 10 percent. Conversely, multi-core performance is average, with stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core scores all positioning in the middle 50 percent. Memory bandwidth tests show average read and write speeds, though the Passmark memory score is weak.

The primary tradeoff of this instance is its low memory-to-vCPU ratio and weak single-threaded execution speed, which makes it less efficient for memory-bound or single-core intensive tasks. However, its dedicated physical cores provide stable multi-threaded execution. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a high density of dedicated compute resources without the added cost of bundled local storage or GPUs. It is appropriate for multi-threaded workloads such as software compilation, ray tracing, static web serving, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 32 physical cores, 32 vCPUs, and 64.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPUs, it relies on a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal a contrast between weak single-core execution, which falls in the bottom 25 percent, and average multi-core capabilities, which rank in the middle 50 percent across stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark tests. Memory bandwidth is average, though overall memory performance scores are weak. Qualitatively, this server offers a high density of dedicated compute resources, making it cost-efficient for multi-threaded tasks that do not require high memory-to-CPU ratios. It is best suited for parallel workloads such as software compilation, static web serving, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.8xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c5.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, offering average multi-core performance for compute-focused tasks.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core compute instance delivering balanced multi-threaded performance for parallel workloads without local storage overhead.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores with 64.0 GB of system memory
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage
Average multi-core performance contrasted with weak single-core execution
Qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-dense, parallel processing tasks
Appropriate for software compilation, static web serving, and database operations
